title: pelargonium × polyphyllum
intro: Pelargonium × polyphyllum, also known as Rose Geranium or Pelargonium sidoides, is a type of flowering plant in the Geraniaceae family, native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which have been attributed to the presence of geraniol and other compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium × polyphyllum include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system.
